name: Cockroach Queen
description: The Cockroach Queen feels much closer to a recurring miniboss than to a normal heavy enemy. It coordinates nearby cockroaches, dominates short-range space, and also changes phase once it goes headless.
behavior: It stays near its group and pressures the battlefield with a heavy frontal style. While it still has its head it mixes bites, kicks, and acid; once the head is gone it shifts into a far more linear but also more chaotic headless stretch.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks as soon as you enter range and makes every nearby cockroach much more dangerous. The big mistake is assuming the fight relaxes once you decapitate it: it really only changes shape.
interactionWithCreatures: Nearby cockroaches react more easily when it enters combat.
strategy: Break its support first when the arena allows it and do not treat it like just a larger roach. The fight becomes far cleaner if you preserve room for the headless phase and avoid getting trapped in the middle of the group when the acid starts to matter.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite: 50. 3-Hit Combo Bite: 50. Side Kick: 45. Body Slam: 60. Acid Spray: lingering damage.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A direct bite used to open pressure if you stay in front of her for too long.

abilities.name: 3-Hit Combo Bite
abilities.description: She chains several short bites if she sees that you are still trapped in front of her.

abilities.name: Side Kick
abilities.description: She twists sideways to catch players trying to circle around or punish from the flank.

abilities.name: Body Slam
abilities.description: She throws her whole body into the attack to break close spacing and punish late blocks.

abilities.name: Acid Spray
abilities.description: She spits acid to close escape routes and leave damaging ground behind for a few seconds.

abilities.name: Headless Ram
abilities.description: After losing its head it throws its whole body forward in a straight rush, covering far more ground than in the normal phase.

abilities.name: Headless Acid Spray
abilities.description: It expels a wilder acid stream during the headless phase and leaves lingering damage if you stay in the line.

bossPhases.label: Phase 1
bossPhases.summary: The queen fights with its head intact and mixes bites, side kicks, body slams, and acid spray to control the front arc.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A direct bite used to open pressure if you stay in front of her for too long.

abilities.name: 3-Hit Combo Bite
abilities.description: She chains several short bites if she sees that you are still trapped in front of her.

abilities.name: Side Kick
abilities.description: She twists sideways to catch players trying to circle around or punish from the flank.

abilities.name: Body Slam
abilities.description: She throws her whole body into the attack to break close spacing and punish late blocks.

abilities.name: Acid Spray
abilities.description: She spits acid to close escape routes and leave damaging ground behind for a few seconds.

bossPhases.label: Phase 2
bossPhases.summary: Once decapitated it does not stop fighting; it shifts into longer body rushes and a much less predictable acid spray.
bossPhases.trigger: Begins once the queen loses its head and enters the headless stretch.

abilities.name: Body Slam
abilities.description: She throws her whole body into the attack to break close spacing and punish late blocks.

abilities.name: Headless Ram
abilities.description: After losing its head it throws its whole body forward in a straight rush, covering far more ground than in the normal phase.

abilities.description: It expels a wilder acid stream during the headless phase and leaves lingering damage if you stay in the line.
